title: Ratta & Co remanded until 1st of July
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Fort Magistrate’s Court on Wednesday (22) ordered for seven suspects who surrendered over acts of unruly conduct, to be remanded until the 1st of July 2022.

Sri Lanka Police said that seven suspects who were wanted for illegal assembly opposite the Police Headquarters in Colombo on the 9th of June 2022 as well causing damage to public property, and obstructing the duties of police officers, surrendered to the Maradana Police via counsel.

Police said that Lahiru Weerasekera, Rathindu Senaratne alias Ratta, Jagath Manuwarna, Dhammika Munasinghe, Venerable Rathkarawwe Jinarathana Thero, Eranga Gunasekera, and Jehan Appuhamy had surrendered, and they were remanded to the 1st of July.
However, Wasantha Mudalige and Venerable Galwewa Siridhamma Thero had NOT surrendered to Police.
New bail order for Johnston, 24-hours after CA dismisses application to prevent arrest
